test.name: Process Credit Card Payment

kw.name: Submit Credit Card Payment
kw.msg: Wrong response code received (expected 200 but received 500) **SENT DETAILS** URL: https://api.payments-service.internal/v1/transactions Method: POST **RESPONSE DETAILS** Reason: Internal Server Error Response Body: {"Message": "Payment gateway connection timed out after 30s"}

test.status: Wrong response code received (expected 200 but received 500) **SENT DETAILS** URL: https://api.payments-service.internal/v1/transactions Method: POST **RESPONSE DETAILS** Reason: Internal Server Error Response Body: {"Message": "Payment gateway connection timed out after 30s"}

test.name: Process PayPal Payment Creates Order

kw.name: Confirm PayPal Order
kw.msg: Wrong response code received (expected 201 but received 422) **SENT DETAILS** URL: https://api.payments-service.internal/v1/paypal/orders Method: POST **RESPONSE DETAILS** Reason: Unprocessable Entity Response Body: {"Message": "Invalid PayPal configuration", "detail": "Merchant account not active in sandbox environment"}

test.status: Wrong response code received (expected 201 but received 422) **SENT DETAILS** URL: https://api.payments-service.internal/v1/paypal/orders Method: POST **RESPONSE DETAILS** Reason: Unprocessable Entity Response Body: {"Message": "Invalid PayPal configuration", "detail": "Merchant account not active in sandbox environment"}

test.name: Payment Status Reflected In Order After Completion

kw.name: Verify Order Status Is Confirmed
kw.msg: Order status still 'pending' after 30 seconds, expected 'confirmed'

test.status: Order status still 'pending' after 30 seconds, expected 'confirmed'

test.name: Declined Card Shows Appropriate Error Message
